title: Edison International (EIX) Q4 Earnings Beat, Sales Rise Y/Y
text: Edison International's (EIX) fourth-quarter 2021 adjusted earnings surpass the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 10.5%. Revenues improve 5.5% on a year-over-year basis.

title: Edison International (EIX) CEO Pedro Pizarro on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Edison International (EIX) CEO Pedro Pizarro on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Edison International (EIX) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Edison International (EIX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 10.48% and 1.46%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Utility Stock Q4 Earnings to Watch on Feb 24: AEP, EIX & More
text: Among the S&P 500 utility companies that have released their Q4 numbers so far, 33.3% beat on earnings. AEP, EIX, NRG, TAC, CWT & PMRW are set to report Q4 results on Feb 24

title: Edison International - A Californian Utility Play With A 'Buy'
text: Edison International is a Californian-based utility. The company has overall good fundamentals, a nice customer base, and a potentially good upside.

title: What's in Store for Edison International (EIX) in Q4 Earnings?
text: Edison International's (EIX) Q4 results are likely to reflect the favorable impact of economic growth on sales, partially offset by the unfavorable impact of weather conditions.
